suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify AGENTS update target path for mission tasks (mission-scoped AGENTS vs repo-root AGENTS) and explicitly note when repo-root AGENTS.md is absent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for polish-2nd-pass-docs-config-deps observed worker path ambiguity and transcript attempts against both /web-demo-v2/AGENTS.md and mission AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify runtime-worker procedure for non-UI docs/config/refactor features by explicitly allowing no-agent-browser/no-demo-gallery validation when there is no user-visible runtime UI behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed features recorded runtime-worker guidance mismatch: accepted runs relied on tsc/vitest (plus targeted Playwright where relevant) without agent-browser/demo-gallery despite current runtime-worker verification defaults.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature-specific runtime-worker mismatch note from polish-2nd-pass-code-tests
